title: psychotria solfiana subsp. ngollengollei
intro: Psychotria solfiana subsp. ngollengollei is a subspecies of plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the "Ngollengollei" or "Sulfur flower". It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health conditions due to its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psychotria solfiana subsp. ngollengollei include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
